name: Indian French Toast
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except bread and margarine in a blender or food processor and blend until the herbs are finely chopped.
2. Pour the resulting batter into a wide shallow dish. It can be stored covered in the refrigerator for up to three days if meals are planned ahead.
3. Melt the margarine in a large skillet or frying pan.
4. Dip one slice of bread at a time into the batter until it is well coated, then place it into the skillet and fry until the bottom is medium brown.
5. Flip the bread and cook for another minute.
6. Serve immediately off the stove.
